---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: article
description: "A structured, project-based path through smart meter data: disaggregation, forecasting, anomaly detection, and grid-edge value, from raw signal to business insight."
---

<div class="cover-hero column-page">
<div class="cover-hero-row">
<div class="cover-hero-text">
<p class="cover-eyebrow">A practical book for energy analytics and ML practitioners</p>
<h1>Machine Learning for Smart Meter Data</h1>
<p>From raw meter signal to business decision: disaggregation, forecasting, and grid-edge value, built to be run, not just read.</p>
<p class="cover-author">By <a href="https://sambaiga.github.io/" style="color:#38BDF8;font-weight:600">Anthony Faustine</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga" title="GitHub" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sambaiga" title="LinkedIn" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="mailto:sambaiga@gmail.com" title="Email" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i></a></p>

<div class="cover-cta-row">
<a href="preface.qmd" class="btn-cover btn-primary-cover"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read the preface</a>
<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ml-energy-disaggregation" class="btn-cover btn-secondary-cover"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cover-hero-visual" role="img" aria-label="A meter signal flows through data analytics and ML into business value">
<div class="signal-node signal-node-meter">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-speedometer2"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Meter Signal</span>
</div>
<span class="signal-connector"></span>
<div class="signal-node signal-node-model">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu-fill"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Data &amp; ML</span>
</div>
<span class="signal-connector"></span>
<div class="signal-node signal-node-value">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-bullseye"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Business Value</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pipeline-flow">
<div class="pipeline-step">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-1"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">Meter Signal</span>
</div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<a class="pipeline-step" href="book/02-disaggregation/01-what-is-nilm.qmd">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-2"><i class="bi bi-plug-fill"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">Disaggregation</span>
</a>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-3"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">Forecasting</span>
</div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-4"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">Grid-Edge Value</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="column-page">

<p class="section-label">Your learning path</p>

<div class="roadmap-grid">

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-1"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-activity act-icon act-icon-1"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 1 · Foundations</span>
<p class="act-desc">Smart meter data fundamentals, signal processing, and the data pipelines every later chapter builds on.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Reading a meter signal</span><span class="ch-soon">Soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-2"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-plug-fill act-icon act-icon-2"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 2 · Disaggregation</span>
<p class="act-desc">Non-intrusive load monitoring: from the aggregate signal to appliance-level insight.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/02-disaggregation/01-what-is-nilm.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/02-disaggregation/02-feature-engineering.qmd"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Appliance Recognition</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/02-disaggregation/03-multi-appliance-recognition.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Multi-Appliance Recognition</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-3"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow act-icon act-icon-3"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 3 · Forecasting</span>
<p class="act-desc">Probabilistic load and PV forecasting, built on Twiga: point forecasts and calibrated uncertainty.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Forecasting with uncertainty</span><span class="ch-soon">Soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-4"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill act-icon act-icon-4"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 4 · Grid-Edge Value</span>
<p class="act-desc">Clustering, anomaly and theft detection, and LV hosting-capacity questions as DER growth reshapes the grid.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Value at the grid edge</span><span class="ch-soon">Soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<p style="color:#94A3B8;font-size:0.85rem;">Chapters are being written part by part. <a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ml-energy-disaggregation" style="color:#64748B">Follow progress on GitHub</a>.</p>

</div>
